name: 1899 Indoor Golf
about: 1899 Indoor Golf is a premier indoor golf and lounge experience in Ohio, featuring multiple locations including Twinsburg. The facility offers TrackMan 4 simulators with access to over 400 virtual courses, a full bar with craft cocktails, and an elevated food menu focused on fresh local ingredients. Patrons can book by the hour, with a maximum of eight players per bay, and the venue hosts various events, leagues, and private parties. Beyond golf, the space includes amenities like a 1,600 sq. ft. patio with fire pits and a 9-hole Magnolia putting course.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan 4 technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Extensive course library with over 400 global courses
Combines golf with a full bar and elevated food menu
Flexible private event hosting for groups up to 250 people
Option for up to eight players per simulator bay

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated bar food with fresh local ingredients, including sharables, flatbreads, tacos, wings, and salads. Full kitchen available.
Full bar with craft cocktails, beer, and extensive bourbon/whiskey selection. Happy hour daily 3-6 PM with $1 off beer and wine.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitors for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. The facility does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers an elevated food menu and full bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour for the average golfer to play 18 holes. Reservations end 5 minutes before the scheduled time to ensure timely turnover.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding kid-friendly policies or amenities.
